list.name: parser
list.label: Parser
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT parser FROM bench_run ORDER BY parser

list.name: current_sha
list.label: Current commit
list.query: SELECT run_sha AS "__value", substring(run_sha,1,8) || ' (' || to_char(created_at,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') || ')' AS "__text" FROM bench_run WHERE parser='${parser}' ORDER BY created_at DESC

list.name: baseline_sha
list.label: Baseline commit
list.query: SELECT run_sha AS "__value", substring(run_sha,1,8) || ' (' || to_char(created_at,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') || ')' AS "__text" FROM bench_run WHERE parser='${parser}' AND run_sha <> '${current_sha}' ORDER BY created_at DESC

list.name: corpus
list.label: Corpus
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT corpus FROM bench_metric WHERE run_sha='${current_sha}' AND parser='${parser}' ORDER BY corpus

list.name: metric
list.label: Metric (for trend panel)
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT metric FROM bench_metric WHERE parser='${parser}' ORDER BY metric

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'current' AS label, substring(run_sha,1,8) AS sha, parser, mode, n_records, n_errors, elapsed_s, (tokens_total->>'total_tokens')::bigint AS total_tokens, (tokens_total->>'n_calls')::int AS n_llm_calls, created_at FROM bench_run WHERE run_sha='${current_sha}' AND parser='${parser}' UNION ALL SELECT 'baseline', substring(run_sha,1,8), parser, mode, n_records, n_errors, elapsed_s, (tokens_total->>'total_tokens')::bigint, (tokens_total->>'n_calls')::int, created_at FROM bench_run WHERE run_sha='${baseline_sha}' AND parser='${parser}' ORDER BY label DESC

panels.title: Per-metric comparison (Δ = current − baseline)
panels.description: Positive Δ means the current commit moved the metric up vs the baseline commit. Filter the corpus dropdown to drill in.

targets.rawSql: SELECT m.corpus, m.metric, m.system, ROUND(m.mean::numeric, 4) AS current, ROUND(b.mean::numeric, 4) AS baseline, ROUND((m.mean - b.mean)::numeric, 4) AS delta FROM bench_metric m JOIN bench_metric b USING (parser, corpus, metric, system) WHERE m.run_sha='${current_sha}' AND b.run_sha='${baseline_sha}' AND m.parser='${parser}' AND m.corpus LIKE '${corpus}' ORDER BY m.corpus, m.metric, m.system

SELECT m.metric || ' [' || m.system || ']' AS metric_system, (m.mean - b.mean)::float AS delta FROM bench_metric m JOIN bench_metric b USING (parser, corpus, metric, system) WHERE m.run_sha='${current_sha}' AND b.run_sha='${baseline_sha}' AND m.parser='${parser}' AND m.corpus='overall' ORDER BY delta

SELECT r.created_at AS time, m.system AS metric, m.mean AS value FROM bench_metric m JOIN bench_run r USING (run_sha, parser) WHERE m.parser='${parser}' AND m.corpus='${corpus}' AND m.metric='${metric}' ORDER BY r.created_at
SELECT r.created_at AS time, 'total_tokens' AS metric, (r.tokens_total->>'total_tokens')::bigint AS value FROM bench_run r WHERE r.parser='${parser}' ORDER BY r.created_at

panels.title: Documents that changed most (current vs baseline)
panels.description: Per-document title_match swing between the two commits. Useful for spot-checking which records moved.

targets.rawSql: SELECT c.corpus, c.record_id, ROUND((c.llm_metrics->>'title_match')::numeric, 3) AS current_llm, ROUND((b.llm_metrics->>'title_match')::numeric, 3) AS baseline_llm, ROUND(((c.llm_metrics->>'title_match')::numeric - (b.llm_metrics->>'title_match')::numeric), 3) AS delta FROM bench_document c JOIN bench_document b USING (parser, record_id, corpus) WHERE c.run_sha='${current_sha}' AND b.run_sha='${baseline_sha}' AND c.parser='${parser}' AND c.corpus LIKE '${corpus}' AND (c.llm_metrics->>'title_match') IS NOT NULL AND (b.llm_metrics->>'title_match') IS NOT NULL AND (c.llm_metrics->>'title_match')::numeric <> (b.llm_metrics->>'title_match')::numeric ORDER BY abs(((c.llm_metrics->>'title_match')::numeric - (b.llm_metrics->>'title_match')::numeric)) DESC LIMIT 50

__inputs.name: DS_SCIENCEBEAM_BENCH
__inputs.label: sciencebeam-bench
__inputs.description: Postgres data source pointing at sciencebeam_bench database.
